message:
test(oracle): add 14 conformance test suites (391 total)

New suites: correlated subquery WHERE, math functions extended, printf
format extended, subquery as expression, multi-column PK, unique constraint,
VALUES clause, FK cascade, complex join predicates, GROUP BY HAVING (agg
not in SELECT), nested aggregate subquery, complex UPDATE SET, multiple
tables same column names, hex/blob operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
